Open to opportunities

Hey, I'm Abdelrahman 👋

Fullstack Developer · Web3 Enthusiast · Open-Source Contributor

I build fast, clean, and accessible web experiences — from pixel-perfect UIs to robust backend systems. Passionate about Web3 primitives, developer tooling, and turning complex problems into elegant solutions. Currently crafting production apps with Next.js, TypeScript, and Prisma.

GitHubX (Twitter)LinkedIn

Work

Selected Projects

A collection of things I've built — from SaaS products to developer tools and open-source experiments.

T

TIMGAD Project Management

A full-featured project management platform built for teams. Includes kanban boards, task tracking, team collaboration, and real-time updates.

Next.jsTypeScriptPrismaPostgreSQLTailwind CSS
R

React Admin Dashboard

A modern, responsive admin dashboard with charts, data tables, authentication, and dark mode support built with React and Recharts.

ReactTypeScriptRechartsTailwind CSSShadcn UI
D

Dragons Training App

An interactive training and progress-tracking application with gamification elements, XP systems, and user achievement boards.

Writing

Blog Posts

Thoughts on development, tooling, and the occasional deep dive into things that caught my attention.

  • Building a Fullstack App with Next.js 15 and Prisma

    A deep dive into building production-grade fullstack applications using the latest Next.js App Router features, server actions, and Prisma ORM.

    May 10, 2025·8 min read

  • Why I Switched from REST to tRPC

    Exploring the benefits of end-to-end type safety with tRPC and how it transformed my developer experience in monorepo projects.

    Apr 22, 2025·6 min read

  • Framer Motion: The Animations Guide You Didn't Know You Needed

    A comprehensive guide to adding beautiful, performant animations to your React apps using Framer Motion — from basics to advanced gestures.

    Mar 15, 2025·10 min read

  • Mastering Tailwind CSS: Tips and Patterns for Clean UIs

    Practical patterns, component abstractions, and lesser-known utilities that will level up your Tailwind CSS workflow significantly.

    Feb 28, 2025·7 min read
